mapper.select: /** CmmtHldyDao.selectListSummary */ SELECT xx.ym , xx.total_cnt , xx.saturday_cnt , xx.sunday_cnt , coalesce(yy.holiday_cnt, 0) as holiday_cnt , coalesce(yy.dsgn_holiday_cnt, 0) as dsgn_holiday_cnt , coalesce(zz.excl_holiday_cnt, 0) as excl_holiday_cnt , (xx.total_cnt - xx.saturday_cnt - xx.sunday_cnt - coalesce(yy.holiday_cnt, 0) - coalesce(yy.dsgn_holiday_cnt, 0)) AS working_day_cnt FROM ( SELECT to_char(y.date, 'YYYYMM') AS ym , count(y.date) AS total_cnt , sum(saturday) AS saturday_cnt , sum(sunday) AS sunday_cnt FROM ( SELECT x.date , EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM x.date) AS week , CASE WHEN EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM x.date) = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS saturday , CASE WHEN EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM x.date) = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS sunday FROM ( SELECT a.date + b.idx AS date FROM ( SELECT (#{year}||'-01-01')::date AS date ) a CROSS JOIN ( SELECT generate_series(0, 364) AS idx ) b ) x ) y GROUP BY to_char(y.date, 'YYYYMM') ORDER BY to_char(y.date, 'YYYYMM') ) XX LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 6) AS YM , SUM(CASE WHEN USER_DSGN = FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS holiday_cnt , SUM(CASE WHEN USER_DSGN = TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dsgn_holiday_cnt FROM CMMT_HLDY WHERE SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 4) = #{year} GROUP BY SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 6) ) YY ON XX.YM = YY.YM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 6) AS YM , COUNT(YMD) AS excl_holiday_cnt FROM CMMT_HLDY_EXCL WHERE SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 4) = #{year} GROUP BY SUBSTRING(YMD, 1, 6) ) ZZ ON XX.YM = ZZ.YM

/** CmmtHldyDao.selectMonthList */ select ymd ,ymd_nm ,true as holiday_yn from cmmt_hldy ch where ymd like #{ym}||'%' union all select ymd ,ymd_nm ,false as holiday_yn from cmmt_hldy_excl che where ymd like #{ym}||'%'
